description: Unenforced critical_miss in harness evaluator — critical criteria (tdd_red, self_review) could fail without blocking PR merge
Regex false-positive in tdd_red detection — 'contest/' substring matched tdd_red pattern, scoring non-TDD output as TDD
Missing JSON pairing in golden outputs — golden outputs were .txt not JSON, golden-scores.json encoded the very bug it was meant to catch
Setup skill parity miss — setup wizard skill did not reflect autocompact env var guidance added to wizard doc
Overclaimed env var documentation status — docs said env vars were documented when they were not yet fully integrated
CHANGELOG section loss during consolidation — entire changelog section dropped during v1.20.0 release refactoring
Stale hardcoded version examples — wizard doc still showed old version numbers after v1.20.0 bump, passed all tests and self-review
Dead-code pipe in test_prove_it_absorption() — 'grep -qi | grep -qi' was a no-op, test always passed regardless of content
Setup skill cross-reference errors — Step 4/5 incorrectly referenced wizard doc Steps, should be Steps 8/9
Expression injection in workflow YAML — GitHub Actions expression injection vulnerability in Node.js 20 EOL migration
README raw URL pointed to wrong repo slug — install URL used BaseInfinity/sdlc-wizard instead of BaseInfinity/agentic-ai-sdlc-wizard
pr-review.yml assumed single output shape — used fragile jq extraction without array/object fallback, risking silent loss of PR review output
Hook guidance contradicted repo policy — tdd-pretool-check.sh told users to test with 'act' while docs said act is unsupported
Workflow permissions broader than necessary — unused id-token: write on every workflow, write permissions at workflow scope instead of job scope
Daily update cadence docs stale — README/CLAUDE.md/wizard still said 'daily' after consolidation to weekly workflow
Autofix template name/level contradiction — wizard doc said ci-autofix.yml/criticals while repo used ci-self-heal.yml/all-findings
act contradiction between wizard doc and testing/CI docs — wizard recommended act, testing docs said act is unsupported
PR review checkout ref wrong — pr-review.yml checked out wrong ref, concurrency and head.ref injection issues
ci.yml granted workflow-level write permissions while validate job executed PR-controlled scripts — least-privilege violation
Scoring docs desynchronized from actual evaluator — README said TDD GREEN was deterministic when it is AI-judged, wrong det/AI split percentages
Score observability on main not trustworthy — score-history.jsonl empty, SCORE_TRENDS.md stale, generated but never pushed
Friction-signal issue body ships literal placeholder text — envsubst does not evaluate ${VAR:-fallback} syntax, template rendered unresolved variables
Total LLM-judge outage returns passing evaluation — stubbed curl returning nothing still yielded score:4, pass:true, hiding complete evaluator failure
cusum.sh uses obsolete JSONL schema — reads .total instead of .score, drift detection wrong on live CI-written score history
run-simulation.sh full-simulation path operates in wrong working tree — fixture copied as nested folder, package.json not at root
check-compliance.sh exits on first optional warning — set -e + warning check returning 1 aborts before full compliance results
Doc count mismatch — branch changed test script count from 23 to 22 but CI still runs 23, caught by Codex because repo's own test failed
ci-self-heal.yml re-dispatches CI even when no autofix commit was created — wasted CI runs on no-change cases
Silent zero score from 2>&1 mixing stderr into stdout — jq parse failures silently defaulted to score=0
Wrong SDP model — evaluate.sh hardcoded claude-sonnet-4 instead of claude-opus-4-6
N/As display bug — ${DURATION}s when DURATION=N/A shows 'N/As' instead of 'N/A'
Bash operator precedence bug in numeric validation — [ -z $X ] || ! is_numeric $X && X=default has wrong precedence
JSON structure check mismatch — .result or .output or .messages didn't match actual claude-code-action output format
curl 'Argument list too long' — 200KB output inline in curl -d exceeded OS arg limit, workflow crashes
Broken pipe warnings from echo $large_var | grep pattern
ExitPlanMode infinite loop in CI — built-in tools can't be restricted via --allowedTools, hook caused infinite plan mode loop in headless CI
Bash brace default bug — ${3:-{}} closing brace consumed by param expansion, yields {}}
jq result name conflict — --argjson result causes jq parse errors due to internal name collision
macOS bash 3.x compatibility — declare -A associative arrays unavailable on macOS default bash
Backtick injection in CI comments — LLM evidence text with backtick-quoted commands executed as command substitution, causing npm ENOENT + exit 129
Invalid action inputs in daily-update workflow — prompt_file, direct_prompt, model not valid claude-code-action@v1 inputs
outputs.response doesn't exist — claude-code-action@v1 has no response output, workflow silently failed to capture results
--json-schema crashes Claude Code SDK — using --output-format json + --json-schema causes SDK exit code 1
Execution output format varies — array vs object format not handled, extraction fails silently on unexpected shape
Same 2>&1 stderr mixing bug in daily-update.yml — duplicate of the evaluate.sh bug but in a different workflow
workflow_run not firing — invalid 'workflows: write' permission scope caused GitHub parser to silently fail, trigger treated as on: push
gh workflow run 403 — ci-self-heal.yml missing actions: write permission for CI re-trigger dispatch
Scenario validator false positive — non-scenario doc in scenarios/ directory triggered validation for ## Task + ## Success Criteria sections
Missing .gitignore — peter-evans/create-pull-request committed node_modules/ (100+ files) and .cache/ artifacts
E2E UI detection false positive — grep -iE 'UI|...' matched 'requires' substring, falsely adding design_system criterion
plan_mode_tool contradiction — prompt said 'Do NOT use EnterPlanMode' but evaluator wanted it, TodoWrite not accepted as planning
tdd_green_pass invalid JSON with no retry — LLM parse failures had no retry logic (only empty responses retried), causing silent score loss
Expression injection in release.yml — ${{ github.ref_name }} directly in run: shell command allowed tag-based code injection
$TOTAL_ variable name collision in catch-analytics.sh — bash parsed as undefined variable TOTAL_ instead of $TOTAL + underscore
